name: uizze
description: STOP UI SLOP. Ground coding agents in 800,000+ real web and iOS screens before generic UI ships.

interface.shortDescription: Kill generic UI before it ships
interface.longDescription: If your UI looks AI-generated, you've already lost the first impression. Use 800,000+ real interfaces, a product-specific design contract, required states, and a hard finish gate before generic UI reaches users.
defaultPrompt: Kill the generic defaults, define a product-specific design contract, then implement it.
Run the UIZZE finish gate and fix every blocking issue before shipping.
Ground this responsive interface in real product evidence and include every state.
